body: Internal benchmark corpus + curation flow. Adds internal/corpus package, ddx-agent corpus promote|validate|list subcommand, --corpus-only / --capability=<tag> filters in run_beadbench.py, and docs/helix/02-design/benchmark-corpus.md. Seeded with 3 promoted beads (agent-39f79181 capability sampling-resolver-cli-wiring, agent-b6b15fb0 failure_mode openai-flavor-thinking-leak, agent-37aeb88e capability beadbench-harness-instrumentation) and 7 capability tags. All acceptance gates pass: validator rejection cases tested, atomic-write rollback tested, corpus-filter Python tests added, fmt + gosec + go test ./... + go test -race ./... all clean.
